tfex_s50.contract_months: 3 nearest consecutive months plus the next 3 quarterly months; the continuous series rolls the quarterlies only (H/M/U/Z)
tfex_s50.settlement: cash-settled; last trading day = the business day immediately preceding the last business day of the contract month, trading ceases 16:30

basis_note: Signals are computed on the Panama back-adjusted continuous series (ADR-0003), not on a listed contract. Execute via the current front quarterly named in front_contract; the roll table under reference/continuous/ audits the stitching. size_units are WHOLE CONTRACTS; prices are index points; one contract's cash value is points x the contract multiplier in the leg's native currency (S50: x 200 THB). The *_usd-named money fields carry native-currency values for a non-USD leg.
